div.p: OCR + AI data extraction from invoices, receipts, CVs and any document. Configure your AI provider and API keys below.

div.div: Rule-Based works immediately with no setup — great for getting started. Upgrade to Local AI (Ollama, free) or Cloud AI when you need higher accuracy.

Ready to use! No API key or internet connection needed. Extracts amounts, dates, emails, phone numbers, vendor names and reference numbers using smart patterns. Accuracy: ~70-80% on structured invoices.
Local AI via Ollama — free and private. Install Ollama from ollama.com, then run: ollama pull llama3. Configure the URL and model below.
Cloud AI — highest accuracy, requires an API key. Groq has a generous free tier — get a key in 2 minutes at console.groq.com.

div.p: This module works with zero pip installs. Install the packages below to unlock more file types. After installing, restart the Odoo server.

div.span: Shows a live status report for all optional packages.

div.div: Most invoices exported from accounting software (QuickBooks, Wave, Xero, ERPNext). Pure Python — no system binary.
Reads photos of invoices and scanned documents. No system binary needed — downloads ML models (~100 MB) on first use.
Required to render scanned PDF pages into images for OCR or AI vision. Pure Python — no system binary.
Better extraction from old binary .doc files. The module already has a UTF-16 fallback built in.
Installs pypdf, PyMuPDF, and easyocr in one click. Covers all file types with no system binary. Takes 2-5 minutes on first run.
Where Ollama is running. Default is http://localhost:11434 for local installs.
Any model you pulled with ollama pull. Recommended: llama3, llama3.1:8b, mistral, qwen2

div.span: Checks if Ollama is running and lists available models.

div.div: Groq is fastest with a free tier. OpenAI and Anthropic offer the highest accuracy.

Free tier available — get your key at
console.groq.com
llama-3.3-70b-versatile — recommended | mixtral-8x7b-32768 — long documents

Get your key at
platform.openai.com
gpt-4o-mini — fast & cheap | gpt-4o — best accuracy

Get your key at
console.anthropic.com
claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 — fast & cheap | claude-sonnet-4-6 — balanced

div.span: Verifies your API key and quota with the selected cloud provider.

div.div: Language code(s) for Tesseract. Use + for multiple. Example: eng+fra+kin. Leave blank if Tesseract is not installed (AI providers read files directly).
Max documents to process in a single batch operation.
Log a warning when daily token usage exceeds this value.
Automatically create vendor bills without manual review if confidence and amount conditions are met.
Invoices above this amount (in company currency) require manual review.
Extract individual product lines from invoices and receipts.
Use Odoo's exchange rates to convert foreign currency amounts.
Assumed currency if detection fails (e.g., RWF for Rwanda).
Create a new vendor contact if the extracted vendor is not found in Odoo.
Automatically detect VAT/tax rates and apply matching account.tax records.
Default purchase tax to apply when tax is detected but not mapped.
Prevent processing the same invoice twice via file hash.
Minimum similarity (0-100) for fuzzy product matching.
Create a new service product if line item description doesn't match any existing product.
Product to use when no product match is found.
Route high-value invoices to managers for approval before posting.
Invoices exceeding this amount require manager approval.
Automatically post vendor bills after approval (skip draft).
Product used for expense lines without a matched product.
Automatically create expense claims when receipt documents are approved.
Automatically process attachments from incoming emails via fetchmail.
User account used to process email attachments (requires DI permissions).
Flag invoices with future dates or dates too old.
Ensure extracted totals and line amounts are positive numbers.
Reject documents without a detectable vendor name.
Track extraction patterns per vendor to improve future extractions.
Send POST notifications to a webhook when documents are processed.
Store the original uploaded file in Odoo attachments.
Automatically delete DI records older than this many days (0=never).
Allow recurring processing of email attachments.
